# Repository Info - First Commit Baseline

## Project
- Name: Sport Booking App v1
- Goal: Capstone-compliant full-stack multi-platform app
- Model-assisted development: Yes (Copilot and AI agent workflow)

## Scope for First Commit
- Establish project governance and planning artifacts
- Define AI agent instructions and coding guardrails

## Included in This Baseline
- AGENTS.md (root)
- .github/copilot-instructions.md
- .github/REPO_INFO.md
- Monorepo bootstrap files and planning docs

## Next Build Milestones
1. Create monorepo skeleton (apps/web, apps/mobile, packages/shared)
2. Initialize Next.js app (web + backend)
3. Initialize Expo app (mobile)
4. Configure Drizzle + Neon and first migration set
5. Implement auth (register/login/logout + JWT + role model)
6. Build first vertical slice (groups/events read + create)

## First Commit Message Suggestion
chore: initialize capstone guidance and reference structure

## Suggested Tag
v1-bootstrap
